raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I received a notification specifying that my card was being fraudulently used and that they had made a Best Buy transaction for the amount of {$140.00} in the XXXX XXXX, another transaction on XXXX for an estimated amount of {$10.00}, and the other transaction on XXXX XXXX for a total of {$32.00} in the state of XXXX. I immediately contacted CITI Bank to report my card for fraud. Since I live in the XXXX XXXX XXXX  and at that time I was in XXXX They were able to see the transactions and were able to stop and delete the Best Buy transactions of {$140.00} and the XXXX XXXX of approximately {$10.00} but the transaction they were unable to stop was the XXXX XXXX XXXX for a total of {$32.00}. They told me not to worry and they were going to open an investigation. and that it would take time. On XX/XX/XXXX, I received the investigation report from CITI Bank which specified that I owed the amount of {$32.00} from XXXX XXXX in XXXX since it was the transaction that they could not stop. At the end of XX/XX/XXXX, I contacted CITI Bank and they told me not to worry, that they were taking time, that I should give them XXXX weeks. I contacted CITI Bank again in XX/XX/XXXX and they were still investigating. I called in XX/XX/XXXX and told them not to worry, and then I received a call from XXXX from the collection department for not making the payment for the amount of {$32.00} from XXXX XXXX in XXXX. That was when I decided that I had to report it to the CFPB.
